overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a gothic great hall filled with students dining at long wooden tables, illuminated by floating candles and warm afternoon sunlight streaming through towering stained glass windows. The camera maintains a steady observation point amidst the seated crowd, capturing the detailed stone architecture and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral-style dining hall with floating candles

students seated along the right side table eating and conversing

entered.detail: tall gothic stained glass windows with intricate designs allowing golden sunlight to stream in
hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination
lengthy dark wooden dining tables laden with food and lined with students
massive stone columns supporting the high vaulted ceiling
high vaulted stone ceiling with gothic architectural details

segments.scene_description: The camera observes a grand gothic dining hall from a fixed position among the tables. Warm sunlight streams through towering stained glass windows on the left while floating candles illuminate the space from above. Students in dark robes sit at long wooden tables eating and conversing, creating a dense but calm atmosphere in this indoor public space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric observation of a grand gothic dining hall filled with the quiet energy of a student meal. It begins from a fixed position amidst the crowd, where the camera captures students in dark robes conversing at long wooden tables. As the gaze lingers, the scene emphasizes the interplay of light, with warm afternoon sunlight streaming through towering stained glass windows on the left. This natural glow blends with the soft flicker of floating candles drifting above the diners, finally illuminating the intricate stone architecture of the vast indoor space.
